hunks.description: Fix get_ui_schema adapter field to avoid missing _service_info runtime bug
Treat reference modules/packages as internal when validating external deps
Update apply command usage to actual CLI filename
Update validate command usage to actual CLI filename

hunks.search_block: `tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py` applies structured patch objects to files on disk.
hunks.replace_block: `tokenizing_patcher_with_cli.py` applies structured patch objects to files on disk.

hunks.description: Fix command overview code blocks to actual CLI filename
hunks.search_block:
```bash
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py --help
```

### Show schema

```bash
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py --schema
```

### Show command reference

```bash
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py --command
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py --command apply
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py --command validate
```

### Emit schema/command info as JSON

```bash
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py --schema --json
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py --command apply --json
```

### Validate a patch against one or more files

```bash
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py validate patch.json file1.py
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py validate patch.json file1.py file2.py file3.py
```

### Apply a patch to one or more files

```bash
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py apply patch.json file1.py
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py apply patch.json file1.py file2.py
```

### Dry-run a patch

```bash
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py apply patch.json file1.py --dry-run
```

### Apply a multi-file manifest

```bash
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py apply patch_manifest.json
```

### Validate a multi-file manifest

```bash
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py validate patch_manifest.json
```

### Use a root directory for relative paths in a manifest

```bash
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py apply patch_manifest.json --root-dir /path/to/project
```

### Write outputs to a separate directory instead of overwriting originals

```bash
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py apply patch_manifest.json --root-dir /path/to/project --output-dir /tmp/patched_out
```

### Create backups when writing in place

```bash
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py apply patch_manifest.json --backup
```

hunks.description: Fix example workflow command snippets to actual CLI filename
hunks.search_block:
```bash
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py validate add_import_patch.json src/tool.py
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py apply add_import_patch.json src/tool.py --backup
```

### Example 2: patch many files with the same patch

```bash
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py validate rename_patch.json src/a.py src/b.py src/c.py
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py apply rename_patch.json src/a.py src/b.py src/c.py --dry-run
```

### Example 3: patch many files from a manifest

```bash
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py validate migration_manifest.json --root-dir /repo/project
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py apply migration_manifest.json --root-dir /repo/project --backup
```

### Example 4: stage patched outputs instead of overwriting originals

```bash
python tokenizing_patcher_with_cli_v2.py apply migration_manifest.json --root-dir /repo/project --output-dir /tmp/migration_stage
```
